рҹ§  *LEARN TODAY*
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
*WACC*
Weighted avg of cost of debt (after-tax) + cost of equity (CAPM). Used in DCF.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
рҹ“– *CASE STUDY*
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
*Marcus Aurelius's private standard*
The most powerful man on earth wrote: 'You have power over your mind, not outside events.' He recorded this not for publication вҖ” it was a private journal. *Greatness often lives in what no one sees.* Build your private standard first.
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
вҷҹпёҸ *YESTERDAY'S GAMES*
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
вқҢ *4 games* вҖ” 1W В· 0D В· 3L (25% WR)
вҸұ 4Г— blitz
вҷҷ White: A40 Englund Gambit Declined | A45 Indian Defense
вҷҹ Black: C41 Philidor Defense
_Rough session. Review the losses вҖ” find the pattern before playing again._
[вҶ’ Review on Lichess](https://lichess.org/@/AKK_010)

рҹ’Ў _Lure the king or a key piece onto a bad square with a sacrifice._

рҹ“ҡ *Study focus:* Englund Gambit Declined вҖ” 0/2 = 0% WR
